title: StructuredFixtureTask
description: Task payload for the structured-fixture agent. Validated by the host at dispatch time per RFC 0003 §D + agent-manifest.schema.json `handoff.taskSchemaRef`.

extractionFields.description: Field names to extract. Each appears as a key in the return payload's `extracted` object.

language.description: IETF BCP 47 language tag for the source text.
